title: Wavy Sand Sides
description: Gives sand a wavy side texture, with mirroring on its sides, while keeping rotations on its top and bottom faces.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Wavy Sand Sides** gives sand types a wavy side texture, with mirroing on its sides, while keeping its rotations on its top and bottom faces.
